violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of (support beam and storage table ) in the (basement) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material.PIC to provide inspector with proof of replacement. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2020

The floors throughout kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, grease, and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

(Various food product) was observed held at (53-54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Wood is used in the construction of (storage table and support beams) in the (basement area) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2020

(Pizza Prep Unit ) located in the (front counter) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 48DF. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer and food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The outside grease disposal area is observed with of accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Persons unnecessary to the food establishment were observed in the food preparation, food storage, and/or warewashing areas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bathroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2020

Raw chicken was was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing.PIC moved to refrigeration unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the (all) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
Food product were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Wood is used in the construction of (storage table and support beams for grease trap in the (basement) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2020
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (dough mixer) have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The grease disposal and back outside area surrounding building as an accumulation of trash, litter, equipment, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The floors in the kitchen and basement area have an accumulation of soil residue, grease, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
